entry.title: FWZZ - Exchange disappearing from Exchanges tab while creating class id creation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 
I am facing a strange problem in version 2023 01 (02/2024) FPS where while creating class id via FWZZ whenever I enter the exchange it disappears after any function code like Enter, Save or Check and I am getting error 'Enter a exchange' 65(306). I tried to look for any note but didn't find anything.
Any idea about what can fix it or why it is happening? 
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay-Payout curves-Interpolation
entry.content:
@rkumar1947 Yes, Flexible Payout Curves does support Interpolation. I haven't had time to document it but it's not really complicated, you just take the points from business goal Min/Low/Default/High/Max and add them to separate lines in the Flexible Payout Curve file. So for example for scenario 4:

You can add an unlimited number of lines/points for each goals (vs 5 in Admin Center UI). But at the end of the day it doesn't change anything to the logic applied to the calculation which the one explained in the blog.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Curriculum Retraining Notification

entry.title: Re: Curriculum Retraining Notification

entry.title: Re: New SAP Gateway Demo System available

Is this still relevant?

I've been asked to complete this learning, but hitting too many road blocks such as the ES5 system unavailable.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-with-sap-integration-suite

entry.title: Using Table Lookup substitution type in Manage Substitution/Validation application in UPA system
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

In this post we will see how to use Table Lookup in Manage Substitution rule for substitute value in field using CBO (Custom Business Object.

In Universal Parallel Accounting 2023 (3191636), there are many functions are enhanced and made Business process easy with new Fiori Application. New changes incorporated which include addition of new functionality such as Ledger wise settlement, Event based revenue recognition etc. and certain things been obsolete. In UPA 2023 

  • Evaluation group fields are obsolete; use extensibility tools instead. See also the entries “Evaluation groups” and “Extensibility: Custom fields for asset master data” above.
  • Group assets are obsolete.

well if the requirement is to club Assets of certain Asset class into one group and so on respectively. We will use CFL (Custom Field Logic) Fiori App for which you can follow my previous blog , Custom Business Object and Manage Substitution/validation for Asset master to achieve grouping of Assets of certain asset class.

Step1: Creation of Custom Field using Custom Field and Logic Fiori App - In order to fill the field with value automatically when master is created in company code and asset master, we need field to be created for asset master. Standard field can also be leverage to substitute with value. Please follow my previous blog for creating custom field in master date using Custom Field and Logic fiori application.

Step2: Creating Custom Business Object - Custom Business Objects (CBO) is a tool used to create own business objects for use in database tables or as the basis for custom applications. For simple understanding consider CBO as object which have database table in backend which means CBO can be referred and used as table. To create CBO login to Fiori application "Custom Business Objects"

Name CBO, kindly note each CBO start with ZZ1 concatenate name you provide as  identifier

Click on "Create" and post use "Fields" tab of Edit CBO in order to create fields require as per business requirement. In our requirement we will add to two fields in CBO, one for storing Asset class and other to store Group number an Asset class will fall under respectively. Finally click on "Publish" to have CBO activate and ready for use. Please take help of technical team member in order to fill the data in CBO or else its respective backend table can be view in content of data definition marked in yellow color

Once backend data table is identified, we will add the Asset classes and respective group number we want to substitute. Below is table filled with both Asset class such as 1100, 2000 and group number 123, 678 respectively.

Step3 - Creating Substitution Rule using Fiori application "Manage substitution and validation rules - for asset master data" App ID:F6968.

Substitution rule will be create which will take reference from CBO using substitution type Table Lookup to substitute data automatically with Asset group when asset is created in Asset class mapped in backend table as shown above. In our example no precondition is filled as we want this rule to be applicable on all the company code across the client. But if you have requirement to make this applicable to certain Company code or other attribute then do select in precondition

things to note here is that "Target Field" in Substitution is the field in Asset Master data where value will get substitute and Source is the field in CBO i.e. Asset group number in our example. So whenever Asset master will be created in asset class respective Asset group number from CBO will filled in Asset master custom field created to store the group number

Our custom field created to store asset group number in asset master data get substitute automatically with CBO field value of respective asset class on the creation of asset master data.

Hope this blog is helpful.

Let me know if you have any question or provide feedback if any

thanks

Raunak Bhatia

entry.title: Re: Clarification on reverse implementation of S4HANA fro...
entry.content: There is no option to roll back. The only option was to export all data and import back again.

entry.title: Re: ArchiveLink connection issue: ERROR => NiBufIConnect:...
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I've followed SAP Note 595563 (ArchiveLink Customizing), but this error still occurs: ERROR => NiBufIConnect: non-buffered connect pending after 5000ms.

Any ideas?

Thx!

entry.title: Re: How to Exclude English Business Words from Auto-Trans...
entry.content:
Hi Justin,

SAP Enable Now uses SAP Translation Hub to translate manually entered text.  There is no way to modify the modify how SAP Translation Hub translates content from within Enable Now.  so, if there is any way to do this, the modification must be done on the Translation Hub side but when I have previously asked the Translation Hub team about this, I was informed that this was not possible.

I would repost this question on an SAP Translation Hub community, if one exists, and if not, on a BTP community.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: User role cannot access workarea
entry.content:
Hi there,

There are two types of permissions in Enable Now, User Permissions that are added to User Roles to allow users to access Enable Now functionality.  I think this is the functionality that you are using.

The second type of permission in Enable Now is a Workarea Permission. Workarea Permissions control access to the content in a Workarea.  To modify these:

1. Open Manager
2. Select Administration > Workspaces and Tags
3. Click the Manage Access link beside the Workspace that you are trying to control
4. Add a User Role, e.g. Administrators, to the Selection field and then give that User Role the correct access to the Workspace
5. Click OK after adding all the relevant User Roles and specifying the level of access for each Role

Administrators should have full access to the Workspace.  Master and Standard Authors should be able to create, edit and delete content, and Learners should only be able to view published content.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Staging with serial numbers via MIGO
entry.content:
We are staging for service orders and do this with transaction MIGO posting the goods issue. This leads to the outbound delivery in S4 and in Embedded EWM. We are also handling material which is relevant for serial numbers. Our goal is to avoid to enter the serial number in MIGO but at the process of picking in EWM. The worker shall decide which serial number has to be taken. 

As our serial number profile demands a mandatory serial number at the delivery and the goods movement, we have to enter the serial numbers already in MIGO. Does someone know a possibility to avoid this in SAP-standard? Was hoping that there is a standard solution in EWM. Didn‘t find a fine solution for that besides exits or enhancements.

entry.title: Re: Authors failing to create documentation in producer
entry.content:
Hi Mira,

There are multiple reasons that Enable Now stops generating documentation, e.g. companies upgrade their Microsoft Office suite to an unsupported version of Office 365.  There are a few options to progress this issue:

1. Try opening and clearing the Javascript Console in Producer - select View > Javascript Console - and then generate the documentation again.  Check the Console for an error, this may help you to identify the problem
2. Use this KBA to troubleshoot your issue.  You will need to download and run an executable file, so you might have to get your IT team involved, but that executable may identify the issue with your systems
3. Raise an SAP support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and get support involved

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to expose on-premise SAP B1 service layer with si...
entry.content: The .cer and .key formats are required. there are several options to covert them but I used the online tool provided by the CA. I assume your CA also provide it.

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP BTP and On-Premise SAP Business One using the SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hello @kruzikruz 

"Option 2: Expose the Service Layer through the SAP Cloud Connector" is only for the BTP development. then you set up the BTP destination like the above screenshot and use the destination as a service connection when you create a new project in Build Code, Build Apps and etc.

If it's a 3rd party app like the react native application. the above option doesn't work. you need to go with the "Option 1: Expose the Service Layer over the internet using a reverse proxy". in this case, you need to modernize the SAP Business One Landscape using reverse proxy: Best Practices for Technical Implementation of SAP Business One Web Client . then service layer can be accessible just like you use the cloud odata endpoint.

 

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: T4/T4A, and reconciliation reports for canada payroll
entry.content:

How to prepare T4/T4A, and how does data flow into the T4 forms ?

what is reconciliation of payroll accounts. What are prerequisites and process flow ?

How do we ensure payroll is accurate, compliant with Canadian tax laws, and that employees receive the proper year-end reporting documentation.

Please help

entry.title: Integrated FI-GR not releasing data into Group Reporting when Journal Release is executed.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a confusing problem with FI-GR integration.
We have set up preparation ledger(0L), assigned same FYV in GR as we have in FI and configured the version. We have mapped all relevant  FSI and CUs as well. However, when I try to run Journal Release, it only gave warning and no data is released. Here are the observed sys behaviours:

  1. When Journal Release is executed for CUs with existing FI data, no data is released and only a warning is given as shown below.
  2. When FI data is uploaded into a company code via DMC, Journal release for the corresponding CU in GR does not import any data as well. It only gives same warning message.
  3. When fresh journal entries are made in FI, journal release for the corresponding CU run successfully. 
  4. I also observed that the GR fields are not shown when I view posted journals via Manage Journal Entries app:

At this point, I am completely lost on what else to do. I appreciate all the help I can get.

Thanks & Regards,
Seyi.

entry.title: Re: Integrated FI-GR not releasing data into Group Report...
entry.content:
Data Release behavior differs based on whether the GRPL is activated for the posting period of the journals uploaded in ACDOCA.
If GRPL is activated for 2024 and onwards, and you upload journals with posting fiscal year = 2024, then you need to check whether GRPL derivation works for those journals, especially FSI and CU. If no, you need to verify your FSI / GL mapping excel and CU definition or GRPL substitution rules which overwrite the default derivation logic. Then run the realignment job to make sure that GR derivation reflected with those journals and try data release via data monitor which is on delta mode by default.

entry.title: Re: DVM Report generation for S/4HANA (without Solution M...
entry.content:
First of all, please make sure not to upload multiple times within 7 days. If there was a successful upload e.g. Jan. 20th, please only try to upload again after Jan. 27th.

In case still not working by following above rule, please raise a support case and attach the generated zip file for further analysis.

I've already confirmed that certificates issued by public CA like Amazon can be used.
The Destination setting is as shown in the attached screenshot.

I look forward to hearing from you.

entry.title: Tailored Automated Recommendations for SAP Notes - SYSTEM Recommendation App
entry.content:
Hello,

we followed configuration steps to enable System Recommendations: Setup in SAP Solution Manager 7.2 and enable for certain SAP NW ABAP systems with assumption that app will only display notes that are relevant based on satellite system version as name suggested  "Tailored Automated Recommendations" but it simply dumps the whole list of notes which are even not applicable to that particular system.

example: in case we have K1P which is ECC (ABAP) system if we check in system recommendation app it still display old notes from DIGITS which are not even relevant to the current SAP_BASIS component or Kernel we have in that system currently.

having said that is our assumptions incorrect or did we PERSON_NAME any setup as we ensured that managed system config to that K1P system is correct and LMDB also has latest information.

please find attached screen

thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Tailored Automated Recommendations for SAP Notes - SY...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Greetings from SAP Support.

There are two possible reasons that System recommendations is showing non-relevant kernel notes or notes that were already applied. 

1.Outdated kernel information in SLD/LMDB

2.Notes with Validity "This document is not restricted to a software component or software component version". 

Therefore please check as following:

  1. The kernel information for the managed system should be synchronized into LMDB. Use notes 1867494 and 1717846 for kernel registration (KernelReg for all technical instances) in SLD. Then ensure that SLD-LMDB resync is carried out so the kernel info is available in LMDB for the managed systems.

  2. If the System Recommendations continues showing notes already applied, check these explanations for this behavior below.
  • Release Independent Notes
    Examples: SAP Notes 1616535, 1593885 
    You could see the following text in the note link
    Validity
    "This document is not restricted to a software component or software component version"
    This is called release independent note.
    SysRec is a tool based on the software component/support package for the managed system in LMDB to calculate the note. If the installed support package is in the range of the SAP Note's correction instruction, then it is called "Support Package &1 Related". You could implement with SNOTE. If the installed software component in the valitidy of the SAP Note, then it is called "Support Package Independent".
    But for security note / hotnews, there are also some notes without any software component and support package. These notes cannot be analyzed. If they are not shown and may be relevant to your system, you would have the security gap. So in order to let you not miss any these notes, they just shown as "Release Independent Notes". Then you could decide whether you need to check whether relevant or not.
    You will also find the statement in the bottom of Note:
    SAP provides this CVSS base score as an estimate of the risk posed by the issue reported in this note. This estimate does not take into account your own system configuration or operational environment. It is not intended to replace any risk assessments you are advised to conduct when deciding on the applicability or priority of this SAP Security Note. For more information, see the FAQ section at https://support.sap.com/securitynotes.

Best regards,

SAP Support

Best Regards
Matt

entry.title: 回复： Quality certificates issue with printing for differen...
entry.content:
Hi Anita,

The Manage Quality Certificates for Inspection Lots app doesn't support you to select the form template manually. It will only select the form template based on the rule you maintained in the output parameter determination app. So you should maintain the rule accordingly.

Best Regards,
Matt

entry.title: ABAP Round Trip Time
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am investigating transaction log from SAP GUI and would like to confirm ABAP "response time" meaning.

My understanding is the below.

E2E Round Trip Time = GUI Time（Front EndProcessing time）+ GUI Net Time（Communication time）+ Response Time（Application Processing Time）

Do you think that my understanding is correct?

Could you tell me  SAP provide any official docs with this?

 

ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: Regarding Fiori App F3473_ Transport Request Management
entry.content:
We are unable to import a migration project into quality server. Unable to find any TR in the respective tile.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Regarding Fiori App F3473_ Transport Request Management
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

If you need to transport content from one system to another, you can use the Migration Object Modeler (transaction LTMOM) to add the relevant content to a transport request. You can add projects, migration objects, and rules to a transport request. Note that only the definition of a rule is added to a transport request. No values, for example mapping values, are included.

If you add a project to a transport request, then all migration objects and rules in the project will also be added to the transport request. If you add a migration object to a transport request, then all rules that are used by the migration object will also be added to the transport request.

Detailed documentation for the SAP S/4HANA migration object modeler can be accessed directly from transaction LTMOM.

The following document is for your reference. Please check page 10 to better understand this issue.

https://www.sap.com/documents/2021/10/6af5929d-007e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Note
  • To transport a project to another system in your system landscape, the project must be created in a system that has specific settings. For more information, see SAP Note 3104790 .
  • A development package is required to transport a project to another system in your system landscape. If a project is assigned to a local development package ($TMP), it is not possible to transport the project to another system in your system landscape. If required, you can use a report to assign a development package to a migration project. For more information, see SAP Note 3119168 .

Best regards,
Ron
SAP Support

entry.title: SNOTE de-implement question
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I have a question about SNOTE.

For example:

I have implemented a note (version a) then implemented new version of this note.

When I run SNOTE --> de-implement

What is the result : back to version a , or "New SAP Notes" ?

Thanks for your help

entry.title: Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 1ST March 2025
entry.content:
Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 1ST March 2025

We are excited to invite you to the Grand Finale of SAP Inside Track (SIT) Bengaluru on March 1st, 2025!  

We bring to you an exclusive opportunity to explore the future of SAP Business AI in all solution areas of SAP Product like BTP, S/4HANA, Ariba, Concur, SuccessFactors. 

Join us in person as we delve into the world of Business AI:  

  • learn how to build AI solutions on SAP BTP,  
  • discover how partners and customers are leveraging SAP Business AI,
  • learn how to develop intelligent AI use cases using Custom AI solution
  • learn how SAP build can transform your business use case with and  
  • explore various SAP solutions with embedded AI through hands-on, insightful sessions and demos. 

Event Overview 

SAP Inside Track 2025 – Business AI Edition aims to provide CXOs, Leaders, Developers, Consultants, Architects, and IT Managers with a deep understanding of how to effectively integrate Business AI with SAP products. 

This event is your gateway to unlocking the full potential of SAP and AI within your organization. 

What is SAP Inside Track? 

SAP Inside Track is a community-driven event where SAP professionals, developers, consultants, and leaders gather to share knowledge and insights on SAP-related topics. Organized by members of the SAP Community, it provides a platform for fostering connections, staying updated on SAP technologies, and gaining recognition for your technical expertise. 
Know more about SAP Inside Track Here! 

Event Details:   

Date: March 1st, 2025  
Time: 8 AM - 5 PM IST  
Venue: SAP Labs India, 138, SAP Labs Rd, EPIP Zone, Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066  

Registration:   

Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to be part of Bengaluru's largest SAP community event! 

Register Now! 
Note: This is an in-person event only. 

Agenda:   

This SAP Inside Track will be a full-day exploration of SAP Business AI. You will: 

  • Learn to build AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform. 
  • Discover innovative Business AI solutions from leading partners. 
  • Witness the transformative power of Embedded AI through live demos across SAP solutions in the areas of S/4HANA, Concur, Ariba, UX/UI, SuccessFactors etc. 

Our event features expert-led sessions by SAP, partners, and customers. Plus, a dedicated hands-on workshop zone and demo booths showcasing AI use cases. 

This time we have a dedicated Expert Zone wherein you get a chance to meet experts from different areas like AI, BTP, S/4HANA, UX/UI etc. 

Stay tuned for the full agenda, which will be posted soon! Join the SAP Community Bengaluru group to stay updated! 

Speaker Registration: 

Speaker registrations are now open! If you're an expert in building AI applications on SAP BTP, developing innovative Business AI solutions, or working with embedded AI in SAP solutions like SAP S/4HANA or SuccessFactors, we welcome your contribution. We also invite partners and customers to showcase their work. 
Register as a speaker here! 

Exclusive Sponsorship Opportunities: 

With over 7500 community members across locations in the past 12 months, we’re eager to continue growing. If you're interested in sponsoring the event, please comment below, and we’ll reach out to you. This year, we have exclusive sponsor bundles that offer opportunities to showcase your content and expertise across multiple locations, including Bangalore, Gurgaon, Hyderabad, and Pune. 

Join the Bengaluru SAP Community Group: 

If you're in Bengaluru or Karnataka, join the Bengaluru SAP Community Group to engage in discussions, share ideas, and collaborate with fellow SAP enthusiasts. 
Stay connected with us on Twitter and LinkedIn for updates on this and future community events. 

Best Regards, 
Ranjeet

entry.title: Re: Could someone please share configuration documents or...
entry.content:
Hello @Subham15 

In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, major configurations that were possible in the on-premise system are not possible. In the cloud environment, you can define a new contract type, but additional configurations like creating new condition tables or business volume selection criteria or any other . Instead, you are required to adopt the predefined best practice solution provided by SAP

Please Go through below link.

1B6

Please refer to the screenshot below, where you can copy and create your own contract type:

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Multi Re-Use component in single UI application.
entry.content:
Hello Rahul,

Thanks for sharing the info.
I tried adding the autoPrefixId="true" property and i was able to fetch these id's in the consuming application. 

 

<core:ComponentContainer
        id="comp1"
        usage="someComponent"
        manifest="true"
        async="true"
        autoPrefixId="true"
    />

 

 Inside Component.js of consuming application,try checking the value in onBeforeRendering.

onBeforeRendering: function(){
  console.log(this.getId()); 
}

entry.title: restrict access to career site by employee group
entry.content:
is it possible to Restrict users in accessing career site based on their employee subgroup?

 

If Employee group = Non-Employees, we need to restrict them,

1. From accessing the internal career site: That is accessing Career site from SF Home page.

2. While, Applying for the Job on the internal career site, they should not be able to login using their mh email address and apply for the job using their mh email address


3. While applying for the job on the external career site, they should not be able to use their mh email address to apply or create an account using mh email address

We have IAS enabled and authentication is based on domain.

FYI My SAP BW release is 740 and SP-level is 0013

Thank you in advance

@Caetano SAP Supply Chain Management

entry.title: Issue with Day-Wise Depreciation Key in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am working on the implementation of SAP FICO Public Cloud for a client in the UAE region. The client has a specific requirement to charge depreciation on a day-wise basis. However, we have encountered the following issues:

  1. There is no predefined depreciation key in the SAP Public Cloud that supports day-wise depreciation.
  2. The system does not allow the creation of a custom depreciation key to meet this requirement.

As this is a critical requirement for our client, I kindly request guidance on how to configure or enable day-wise depreciation in the SAP Public Cloud.

Please let us know if there is a workaround, enhancement request, or additional functionality available to address this requirement.

Looking forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,
Ahsan

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba integration with SAGE ERP (Third Party)
entry.content:
Dear Mr yaccoulibaly

Thank you for your response!!

I have checked for client's requirements sufficient webservices or API's doesn't seem to be available for third party system integration with Ariba.

so custom middleware is the only option available to us in this case?

or kindly advise best ways to look for required webservices or API's, how to verify which Ones's will suffice the requirement?

Thank you!

Regards

Prathamesh

entry.title: Enable OData Streams in RAP
entry.content:
ABAP Conference recording: Enable OData Streams in RAP

Slides: https://abapconf.org/abapconf2024/#/agenda

Check for topic "Enable OData Streams in RAP" where you can find the link to download slides in pdf document.

Use cases covered:

  1. Working with Large Objects
  2. Upload Functionality using Custom Action
  3. Download Functionality using Custom Action
  4. Use XCO library to read and write XLSX Content

Code based GitHub URL's:

1. Upload and Download Functionality application : https://github.com/rvrrpk/OdataStreamsRAP

2. Download History Application : https://github.com/rvrrpk/DownloadHistory

entry.title: Re: T codes
entry.content:
Hi Chaitanya,

While you can create PO/ SO thru Tcodes, TM uses a Fiori / web based approach rather than Tcodes to create documents.

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Could someone please share configuration documents or...
entry.content: Hi @Vivek_Savant thanks, but the link is not accessible.

entry.title: Request for Solution: Asset Retirement to Customer in SAP FICO Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am currently implementing SAP FICO Public Cloud for a client in the UAE region. As part of the client’s requirements, I need to create an uploader for asset retirement to a customer.

Upon reviewing the available APIs, I found the following API for asset retirement:
Asset Retirement - SAP Help Documentation

However, this API only supports asset retirement without a customer. The client requires functionality to retire assets that are integrated with customers.

Could you please advise on how to achieve this requirement? Is there a separate API, enhancement option, or configuration workaround to enable asset retirement to a customer in SAP Public Cloud?

I look forward to your guidance on this matter.

Best regards,
Ahsan

entry.title: Re: Need Best practices in SD
entry.content: Not Helpful

entry.title: SAP Process Orchestration (PO) 7.5 register hardware key
entry.content:
Can you provide guide on how to register hardware key for our new  SAP Process Orchestration (PO) 7.5  ( New system POD)
 

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: None of these

Q: Have you captured an XPI Inspector with Example 18 (RWB) and select the additional option SAP System State? Please do so for analysis.
A:

Q: Are you using PI/PO at all?
A: PO

Q: What is the exact error that is being raised for you?
A: how to register new PO system


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Process Orchestration (PO) 7.5 register hardware key
entry.content:
I understand from your description that you need to create a license key for SAP Process Orchestration (PO) 7.5. SAP Process Orchestration is an add-on to the main product SAP NetWeaver. As a result, PO does not require a separate license key. Instead, only the parent product SAP NetWeaver requires a license key.

If you have not already done so, please request your SAP NetWeaver license key and install it in SLICENSE. Once that is done, you should be able to use PI/PO.

For more detailed information on how to request a license key for SAP NetWeaver, refer to KBA 2346021 - How to request a permanent license key for SAP Business Suite (BST) - SAP for Me

I hope this information is helpful.

SAP Support 
Judy

entry.title: Re: ServerCrash
entry.content:
Dear Isaías,

After the ICM crash, I tried stopsap&startsap but failed, I noticed that the core update time was generated when I stopped the system again after startsap, so it should not be related to ICM.

I'll try to update the kernel, thank you for the guidance.

entry.title: SAC | Creating dynamic thresholds for the sac tables.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm currently facing a challenge where a client has requested a feature in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). They need a table that has threshold, but they want the ability to adjust these thresholds (change the thresholds ranges) dynamically without having to go through the process of editing the entire story each time. Is there a way to implement such functionality in SAC? 

Any insights would be appreciated.

entry.title: Final settlement still credit customer after accrual is reversed with REU1 Rebate Unlikelihood
entry.content:
The scenario is that the customer has failed to meet the rebate threshold, and we need to reverse the accruals and close the agreement. We have used the condition type REU1 (Rebate Unlikelihood) and run a delta accrual. The accruals that had been posted for the agreement have been correctly reversed.

However, if we run a final settlement a credit is passed to the customer account.The expectation is that no credit should be passed to the customer account since there is no accrual available for the customer.

Is there some config that we are missing or we have incorrect? We will have background jobs running so this is a risk that a credit is passed to the customer when it shouldn’t be posted.

entry.title: Re: FUBR condition for Maximum Weight vs Total Gross Weight
entry.content:
Hi Deepak,

I would suggest that you check (1) the FUBR strategy to not consolidate at item level (2) if your condition is working as per your expectation. You may need to look at the Data Crawler functionality to achieve the desired result to select the max item weight rather than just looking at item weight for FUBR selection. 

Regards,

Saurabh Goyal

entry.title: SAP APO Dollar Sign in Cell
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to put dollar sign or percentage sign in the cell by macros. Tried CELL_LICON() but the icon list does not contain the category I want. Does someone know how tot put "%" and "$" into the planning book table?

Many Thanks!

Howard

entry.content:

as wished - described in some notes.

Start with these

Robert

entry.title: Re: How to use GOS attachment URL in CDS view
entry.content: Hi, ususally you store here some documents like PDF. Therefore i don't think it is stored other than as a binary.

entry.title: Re: EWM - Auto create Warehouse Task from Inbound & Outbound
entry.content: @OGurbanli Hi, you can set max volume as a filter for WOCR, but I am afraid there is no standard condition type for WT create based on WOCR.

entry.title: Re: How do I know my SAP Signavio - License?
entry.content:
You can know about this from SAP Signavio Process Manager, by clicking on the Settings > My Profile option.

 

Br,
Rahul Aryan

entry.title: LotMaster custom field data cannot be saved to database
entry.content:
I create a new tab in MSC*N, and extend it in BADI ES_BATCH_MASTER.

refer to sample class CL_EX_VB_BM_ADD_SCREEN_FIELDS, I extend in AFTER_CUSTOM_SCREEN_PAI & BEFORE_CUSTOM_SUBSCREEN_PBO, but can't save addon fields into MCHA.

BEFORE_CUSTOM_SUBSCREEN_PBO：gs_mcha = is_mcha.

AFTER_CUSTOM_SCREEN_PAI：es_mcha = gs_mcha.

I only extend MCHA in system by APPEND.

My question is that does it necessary to extend MCH1 also?

entry.title: Re: How to customize, enhance or edit the Standard Fiori...
entry.content:
As a starting point you might want to check:

  • What is SAPUI5 Flexibility?

  • Extending SAP Fiori Applications

entry.title: update custom fields of services tab of Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an requirement to update custom fields of  services  data of Purchase Order.

we have 2 custom fields added under structure CI_ESLLDB. i tried passing values to BAPI_PO_CHANGE EXTENSIONIN table parameter as beloe

structure name = BAPI_TE_MEPOITEM  , VALUEPART1 = line item of PO , VALUEPART2 as CI_ESLLDB , VALUEPART3 is concatenation of service packg no and service line no and VALUEPART4 as new value and also same line is added to EXTENSIONIN for structure  BAPI_TE_MEPOITEMX.

but after BAPI execution , return parameter is NO data changed.

if anyone has updated custom fields? pls help.

Thank you

Arpita

entry.title: Re: We can not open forms (component configurations) from...
entry.content: Well, sorry but this is probably a Citrix problem. No need for answers.

entry.title: Extracting Line Items from the a Document Template
entry.content:
Happy Monday Experts. I am working on an automation that will auto-approve invoices using a document template. I have create a 'skeleton' so to say. My current setup extracts fields at a Header field. But I need assistance with extracting field at a line item level. Basically I need a clarity on the approach, because various invoices have varying numbers of line items.

Therefore, I would to know if I show create line for the empty fields, that way it would return details should that space been populate and return blank if the fields are empty.

SAP Business Technology Platform #SAP Build Process Automation SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: Re: Request for Solution: Asset Retirement to Customer in...
entry.content: For retirement with customer , it can be only processed by F-92, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/3776d953292a424de10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US and there is no mass retirement with customer. see https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/323940 If there is a RPA purchased for your customer , the scenario can be processed.

entry.title: Re: How to Add Check Box in RAP APPLICATION
entry.content: I faced the same problem last week, and after testing it I found that I needed to add at least one button to it to automatically generate a check box, otherwise I guess the framework would have decided that adding a check box was pointless

entry.title: SAP IBP - Q : Can we copy current week data from Source KF to multiple periods in Target KF?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Q: Do we have option in IBP Copy Operator profile to copy current week data(Source KF) to multiple week based on time period selection during run time (Target KF).

If not any other option to copy current week data from one kf to multiple week in another kf.

Ex:

KF1 : WK1 data 100

KF2: WK1 data 100, WK2 data 100, WK3 data 100..

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to use GOS attachment URL in CDS view
entry.content:
If URL is stored as a binary, how to get data from S/4 to Datasphere?

Convert binery to text, must I use function mudule?

entry.title: How to change Project Demand Name
entry.content:
Dear All,

Our Cost Center has been split, which caused an issue: the Project work hours demand in my project needs to be redistributed. There are two approaches:

  1. I created a new demand while keeping the original WBS and Activity Type. However, the system doesn't allow multiple demands to be allocated to the same WBS and Activity Type.
  2. I had to modify the existing demand instead, but I found that I couldn't change its name. How can I resolve this?

entry.title: Re: General Notification with Reference to Equipment / or...
entry.content:
Greetings,

yes that is correct as already answered in https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-add-equipment-and-functional-fileds-in-general-notification-iqs21/qaq-p/9429283#feedback-error

There is a limited selection of sunscreens depending on notification category. Is there a reason why you don't want use a maintenance notification?  

Since you want use an equipment as a reference object, a maintenance notification n is the logical choice of equipment category.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Minimised Windows Issue
entry.content:
Hi Brassy

Please check below steps:

1. Open B1 client default in full screen.
2. Click the Minimise button then open it again. I have also clicked the Restore Down button next to the Minimise button.
3. Click the Maximize button

Result： B1 window resets to full screen.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: Disable "Negative postings permitted" for a Company Code
entry.content:
Hi Abha Hardikar,

Here is an answer I got from the expert:

When changing the configuration for negative posting logic, this has no impact on existing postings. It only affects future postings, this means future reversals will post with the normal logic for debit credit and not with negative amounts and original debit/credit assignment.

Alice

entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm doing the same learning journey and the SAP Gateway Demo Server is offline at least since Friday, 17th January..

It would be nice, if someone can fix the system. Thank you!

 

Best Regards,
Matthias

entry.title: Re: Enable OData Streams in RAP
entry.content: I recommend explaining more, e.g. saying that you are one of the two presenters, that the Youtube video is posted under the ABAPConf account, providing a better trailer (giving more about the content, not just posting a short table of contents of your conference).

Fujita

entry.title: Error occured while settling the Asset AUC
entry.content: User wants to settle AUC. Settlement rules are defined in Tcode AIAB. But while settling in Tcode AIBU getting Message error: AA317- Check amount entered (Amount is too high).

entry.title: Re: HTML modification in email editor
entry.content: You can also use the HTML block, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_MARKETING_CLOUD/b88f770e4b7c4ecead5477e7a6c7b8f7/fde0fed7f6e24af3900ae7a8dcdd5e5c.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden error on POST http call after XSUAA Implementation
entry.content:
Hey junwu,
I have setup some generic function for calling request.
Here i give some example how i call it.

let Ourl = `/odata/v4/stoneman-crf/MEnum?$filter=EnumType eq 'MENUCODE'`;
        await this.createNewModelUsingAPI('GET', Ourl, null, this.getCflListViewDataSourceModelName());
createNewModelUsingAPI: async function (oRequestType, sUrl, oRequestData, sModelName) {

                await this.callApi(oRequestType, sUrl, oRequestData)
                    .then((response) => {
                        // writing like this .then ((data) => {}) gives the parent context, in this case the controller.
                        console.log('Success:', response);

                        let data = this.prepareData(sUrl, response);

                        var oModel = new JSONModel();
                        oModel.setData(response); // 'data' is the response from your API call
                        this.getView().setModel(oModel, sModelName);

                        this.getView().getModel(sModelName);

                    })
                    .catch(function (error) {
                        console.error('Error:', error);
                    });
            }
callApi: function (type, url, reqData) {
        oBusyIndicator.show(0);
        let oRequestData = '';

        if (typeof reqData === 'undefined') {
          oRequestData = '';
        }

        if (typeof reqData !== 'undefined') {
          if (reqData !== '') {
            oRequestData = JSON.stringify(reqData);
          }
        }

        const apiHandler = this;
        return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
          $.ajax({
            url: url,
            method: type,
            data: oRequestData,
            dataType: 'json',
            contentType: 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
            crossDomain: true,
            async: true,
            /*headers: {
                            "Content-Type": "application/json",
                            "Cookie": "B1SESSION=fc34c65a-4da1-11ef-8000-00155d025317"
                        },*/
            xhrFields: {
              withCredentials: true
            },
            cors: [
              {
                enabled: false
              }
            ],

            success: function (data) {
              // Check if setApiResponseObject is available in the current scope
              console.log(data);
              apiHandler.setApiResponseObject(true, data);
              oBusyIndicator.hide();
              resolve(data);
            }.bind(this),

            error: function (error) {
              // Handle error
              console.error(error);
              oBusyIndicator.hide();
              apiHandler.setApiResponseObject(false, error);
              reject(error);
            }.bind(this)
          });
        });
      }

Can you help me how to handle "header" in callApi function?

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume data from a odata service
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 

Coming to the other page(product details page), while I am doing the connection to the required data and binding that data to appropriate components and also done the navigation so that when a user clicks on a product on the product list page, the user will be taken to the product details page and be shown the product information, I am facing some issues.

while doing the navigation I am binding the required parameters with the data item in repeat elements.(material and serial).

and on the product details page, I have created two page parameters named material and serial and binding them to the data variable while choosing the data variable type as single data record.

and on the User interface page binding the elements to the required data variable fields.

but while previewing, no data is returned.

Please help me to correct this error.
Thank You.

Best Regards,
Yashmin Behera

entry.title: Need guidance on managed system configuration setup pre-requisites as a part of solman SP 19 upgrade
entry.content:
Hi ,
We are planning to upgrade our solman stack from sps 15 to sps 19. Hence need your help on below queries.
1) LM-Service component not get update along with Java stack as we are updating from sp15 to sp19 so we have to update it manually as per the note after Java stack upgrade. Please check below point from note and confirm, we are at SP 14 PL 09

SAP Solution Manger SP 19 = ST 720 SP19 + LM-SERVICE 7.20 SP14 P17 or higher

2) We don't see pre-requisite details from managed system/technical monitoring perspective for SPS 19 upgrade apart from this LM-Service core. could you please let us know if anything else we have to check apart from it or we good to go.
3) can we incl...(truncated)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need guidance on managed system configuration setup p...
entry.content:
Hello ,

Please see the answers with the following.
1.Can we include LM-Service component upgrade along with Java stack upgrad?
A: yes, you can include LM-Service component upgrade along with Java stack upgrade, but after upgrading LM-service, the SP level would be newest, and the patch level may not be the newest.
However, you can upgrade LM-Service separately, by this way, you can get the newest patch level.
If further help is required, you can contact BC-UPG-TLS-TLJ

2.If we are upgrading JVM 8.1 for diagnostic agent in solman, do we have to update same version in managed systems as well.
A: you can upgrade them separately, they're separate and independent.
If further help is required, you can contact SV-SMG-DIA-SRV-AGT

3.If there is a prerequisite for technical monitoring configuration when upgrading the SOLMAN JAVA stack?
A: There is not a prerequisite, but if you encounter issues/errors with technical monitoring configuration after upgrading the SOLMAN JAVA stack, you can contact SV-SMG-MON.

Last but not least, it is necessary to re-execute the steps with the yellow status in SOLMAN_SETUP -> Mandatory Configurations after upgrading Solution Manager, if you meet errors/issues, please create a case/chat to SAP.

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK writes change log without change
entry.content:
Thank you for your feedback.

The two notes didn't quite make sense to me.

The call of the block and how the structures are filled can be seen above.

I don't know what else would help in terms of information. When I try to test the problem myself with a material via the GatewayClient, the logic always works perfectly. (i.e. change DISGR change document)

Before I call the MaterialMaintainDark, I check the MARC-DISGR field with the DB to reduce the number of materials in the module if no changes are made there anyway.

SAP version is still the latest R/3.

Greetings

Daniel

entry.title: Cannot Adapt UI for Task List Maintenance
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement for adapt the UI when we create a new task list for maintenance. For example to takeout some field that will be not used.

The problem is we cannot find the button for Adapt UI, we already check App : Create Task List, Change Task List, and Display Task List.

Any Suggestions?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How can I add code formatting in a comment in response to a question on the SAP Community page?
entry.content:
Hello poweruser of this community platform!

I have recently experienced a situation where a question in the Technology area got my attention and I did not feel like my response was wroth an answer but rather a comment. I needed to add some lines of code but in the comment section I can only hit enter to submit my post but have no option to add formatted text like a list of entries or even a code snippet. Can someone link me a guide or tell me how to do it?

Kind regards!

PS: Or is it simply "open a new tab, start a question and use the editor, copy the text and insert it in the comment field + close the question tab"?

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Understanding Roles And Responsibility
entry.content: Really insighful. Bookmarked your blog. Do you have the same for Grow and S/4H Public edition? Thanks
